steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank modifies "contents" and refers back to "a social media post," which is singular. The sentence needs a singular possessive pronoun, not a plural form or a contraction.

steps.title: Choose the possessive pronoun
steps.content: A is plural, C means "they are," and D means "it is." None can correctly modify "contents" for a singular social media post. The answer is B.
